blog_post_charm.name: Blog Post - Glasses Charm
blog_post_charm.description: Posted at 9:27 PM on the day of the incident. Contains an image of a pair of glasses with two charms attached.

blog_post_charm_updated.name: Blog Post - Glasses Charm
blog_post_charm_updated.description: Posted at 9:27 PM on the day of the incident. Contains an image of a pair of glasses with two charms attached. Stolen approximately 30 minutes after posting.

loud_sound.name: Loud Sound
loud_sound.description: A loud sound heard by Maggey while she was in the shower at around 9:30 PM on the day of the incident.

Detention_Center_Start.text: {bg:DetentionCenter}{fg:Detention_Bars}{center}{color:lime}{blip:3}{showTextbox}September 17{nl}{p:500}Detention Center
{color:white}{sprite:Maggey["Sad"]}{hideCharacter}{hideTextbox}{fadeInCharacter:500}{startBGM:detentionCenter,true}{skip:1000}

Detention_Center_Start.name: Phoenix
Detention_Center_Start.text: {showTextbox}{blip:1}Maggey.

Detention_Center_Start.name: Maggey
Detention_Center_Start.text: {sprite:Maggey["Sad"]}{blip:2}...{p:800}{nl}To be honest, I've been turning it over in my head,{p:160} sir.{p:260}

Detention_Center_Start.name: Maggey
Detention_Center_Start.text: {sprite:Maggey["Sad"]}{blip:2}And I think it's possible{p:180}{nl}that I was the one who pushed Ms. Nakaki over the edge.{p:280}

Detention_Center_Start.name: Phoenix
Detention_Center_Start.text: {blip:1}{playSound:shake}{shake:500}Wait,{p:140} what do you mean?

Detention_Center_Start.name: Phoenix
Detention_Center_Start.text: Could you tell me everything from the beginning?

Detention_Center_Start.name: Maggey
Detention_Center_Start.text: {sprite:Maggey["Normal"]}{blip:2}Yes, sir!{p:180}{nl}{sprite:Maggey["Saluting"]}{sprite:Maggey["Normal"]} That day,{p:140} Ms. Nakaki was on the fourth floor practicing for the Steel Samurai Show.{p:250}

Detention_Center_Start.name: Maggey
Detention_Center_Start.text: She was the kind of person who'd stay and practice after closing...

Detention_Center_Start.name: Maggey
Detention_Center_Start.text: {sprite:Maggey["Determined"]}Honestly,{p:120} from a security guard's point of view, she was a handful,{p:160} sir.{p:220} We argued over it again and again because I kept telling her to stop.{p:220}

Detention_Center_Start.name: Maggey
Detention_Center_Start.text: {sprite:Maggey["Sad"]}Even so,{p:120} I didn't dislike her at all.{p:220}{nl}If it weren't my job,{p:140} I probably never would have warned her,{p:140} sir.{p:220}

Detention_Center_Start.name: Phoenix
Detention_Center_Start.text: {blip:1}So did you argue with her that day too?

Detention_Center_Start.name: Maggey
Detention_Center_Start.text: {sprite:Maggey["Determined"]}{blip:2}A little,{p:120} yeah.{p:200}{nl}But it happened all the time,{p:150} so I gave up and let it slide...{p:360}

Detention_Center_Start.name: Maggey
Detention_Center_Start.text: I had to fill out the security log,{p:140} so I got to work,{p:140} sir.{p:220}{nl}It took about half an hour,{p:140} and then I updated my blog.{p:220}

Detention_Center_Start.name: Phoenix
Detention_Center_Start.text: {blip:1}Blog?

Detention_Center_Start.name: Maggey
Detention_Center_Start.text: {blip:2}Yes, sir!

Detention_Center_Start.name: Maggey
Detention_Center_Start.text: If you search:{nl}"{color:red}The Jinxed Fallen Angel's Blog - Glasses Charm{color:white},"{p:160}{nl}it should come right up.{p:220}
{hideTextbox}{fadeOutCharacter}{fadeOutBg}{fadeOutFg}{p:100}{fadeBg:BlogPost,500}{showTextbox}{skip:1000}

Detention_Center_Start.name: Phoenix
Detention_Center_Start.text: {showTextbox}{blip:0}{color:lightblue}(What a creepy blog title...{nl} Ah, this must be it.)
{addEvidence:blog_post_charm,true}{playSound:evidenceUnlock}{color:lightblue}Data for "Blog Post - Glasses Charm" added to the Court Record.

Detention_Center_Start.name: Maggey
Detention_Center_Start.text: {color:white}{hideTextbox}{fadeOutBg}{p:100}{fadeBg:DetentionCenter,500}{fadeFg:Detention_Bars,500}{fadeInCharacter:500}{p:100}{showTextbox}{sprite:Maggey["Saluting"]}{sprite:Maggey["Normal"]}{blip:2}After happily uploading a photo of my favorite glasses charms to my blog,{p:160} I remembered Mr. Shawit had called for me,{p:170} so I rushed off to take a shower,{p:140} sir.{p:240}

Detention_Center_Start.name: Phoenix
Detention_Center_Start.text: {blip:1}Huh?

Detention_Center_Start.name: Maggey
Detention_Center_Start.text: {sprite:Maggey["Sad"]}{blip:2}When I got out of the shower,{p:150} my glasses were gone.{p:260}

Detention_Center_Start.name: Phoenix
Detention_Center_Start.text: {blip:1}Then what about the glasses you're wearing right now?

Detention_Center_Start.name: Maggey
Detention_Center_Start.text: {sprite:Maggey["Determined"]}{blip:2}I had someone bring the spare pair from my place.{p:220}{nl}I have astigmatism,{p:140} so without glasses I can barely see a thing,{p:140} sir.{p:220}
{updateEvidence:blog_post_charm,blog_post_charm_updated,true}{playSound:evidenceUnlock}{color:lightblue}{blip:0}Data for "Blog Post - Glasses Charm" updated in the Court Record.

Detention_Center_Start.name: Phoenix
Detention_Center_Start.text: {color:white}{blip:1}So you were walking around practically blind...{p:320}

Detention_Center_Start.name: Maggey
Detention_Center_Start.text: {blip:2}Exactly!{p:140}{nl}I walked toward the railing in the dark, scared out of my mind.{p:220}

Detention_Center_Start.name: Maggey
Detention_Center_Start.text: Well,{p:120} really, I only made out the shape of someone sitting on the railing...{p:340}

Detention_Center_Start.name: Maggey
Detention_Center_Start.text: I called out,{p:140} but there was no answer,{p:140} so I reached out my hand,{p:140} sir.{p:220} I felt like I touched something...{p:300}{nl}Or maybe I didn't,{p:150} I can't be sure...{p:300}

Detention_Center_Start.name: Maggey
Detention_Center_Start.text: {playSound:shake}{shake:500}And then, all of a sudden, I heard something crash down below...

Detention_Center_Start.name: Phoenix
Detention_Center_Start.text: {blip:1}I see.{p:180} Was there anything else that stood out to you?

Detention_Center_Start.name: Maggey
Detention_Center_Start.text: {sprite:Maggey["Normal"]}{blip:2}Something else that stood out...{p:280}{nl}{sprite:Maggey["Saluting"]}{sprite:Maggey["Normal"]}Oh, yes,{p:100} sir!{p:140} It happened when I got into the shower.{p:220}

Detention_Center_Start.name: Phoenix
Detention_Center_Start.text: {color:lightblue}{blip:0}(If she was just starting her shower, that puts it at around 9:30 PM.)

Detention_Center_Start.name: Maggey
Detention_Center_Start.text: {color:white}{blip:2}I could hear it even over the shower,{p:160}{nl}so it must have been a pretty loud impact,{p:140} sir.{p:220}{playSound:cling}{flash}

Detention_Center_Start.name: Phoenix
Detention_Center_Start.text: {color:lightblue}{blip:0}(That's odd. I should ask someone about this.)
{addEvidence:loud_sound,true}{playSound:evidenceUnlock}{color:lightblue}{blip:0}Data for "Loud Sound" added to the Court Record.

Detention_Center_Start.name: Maggey
Detention_Center_Start.text: {color:white}{sprite:Maggey["Determined"]}{blip:2}Mr. Wright...{p:260}{nl}I really messed up,{p:140} didn't I?{p:220}{nl}They're going to find me guilty,{p:150} aren't they...?{p:320}

Detention_Center_Start.name: Phoenix
Detention_Center_Start.text: {blip:1}It's okay,{p:140} trust me.{p:220}{nl}I'll uncover the truth and get you out of this.{p:220}

Detention_Center_Start.name: Phoenix
Detention_Center_Start.text: {color:lightblue}{blip:0}(All right. I think I'm done here.){setState:detention_center_done,true}{color:white}{jump:Detention_Center_Default}{sectionEnd}
